executives.name: Ken Konkin
executives.background: Mr. Konkin is a Professional Geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and mining. He was instrumental in the discovery of the Valley of the Kings deposit at Pretium Resources Inc. and has worked extensively in the Golden Triangle of British Columbia.

executives.name: Scott Davis
executives.background: Mr. Davis is a partner of Cross Davis & Company LLP, a firm focused on providing accounting and management services to publicly listed companies. He has over 20 years of experience in the financial sector.

executives.name: Natalie Senger
executives.background: Ms. Senger is a Professional Geoscientist with over 15 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project management and geological modeling.

board_of_directors.name: Walter Storm
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Storm is a successful entrepreneur with over 50 years of experience in the mining and oil and gas industries. He was a co-founder of Osisko Mining and has been involved in several major resource discoveries.

board_of_directors.name: Ken Konkin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Konkin is a Professional Geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and mining.

board_of_directors.name: Helmut Finger
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Finger is a businessman with extensive experience in international trade and finance, particularly in the European markets.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald-Peter Stöferle
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Stöferle is a Managing Partner and Fund Manager at Incrementum AG. He is well-known for his 'In Gold We Trust' report and has deep expertise in precious metals markets.

board_of_directors.name: Sean Pownall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pownall has been involved in the mineral exploration industry for over 30 years. He is the owner of More Core Diamond Drilling Services Ltd., which operates in North America and internationally.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Board of Directors Page
